name: The ClubHouse Indoor Sim Co.
about: The ClubHouse Indoor Sim Co. is an indoor golf venue in Marysville, CA, featuring four state-of-the-art bays powered by Trackman technology. The facility offers a full indoor driving range experience where golfers can practice or play virtual rounds on top global courses. Pricing varies by day and time, with weekday rates ranging from $35-$45/hour and weekend rates at $45/hour. The venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels, with the option to bring personal clubs or borrow from the facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Ability to play on world's top golf courses
Club rentals available for those without equipment
League play options for regular competition

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, food policies not specified
BYOB allowed, alcohol policies not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or borrow from The ClubHouse.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB is allowed, but specific food policies are not detailed on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and group size, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The ClubHouse is welcoming to families and appears to be kid-friendly based on their general facility description.
